name: cachy-engineering
description: Project skills and operating behaviors for building Cachy.

interface.shortDescription: Build Cachy with project-specific engineering skills.
interface.longDescription: Cachy Engineering provides focused skills for the Go proxy, Electron companion app, WASM plugin system, cross-platform release engineering, security review, evidence-driven investigation, ADRs, and test-first development.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Cachy Engineering when working on the Cachy repo.
